reviews.comment: The tour was perfect!! Yandi is very caring and helpful, he always keep us informed so that we won’t get lost on the schedule and basically he arranged things perfectly for us! For the ijen tour, that was marvellous! Fauzi took good cares of me n my friend throughout the whole trip. The route was not easy but Fauzi kept cheering us up and eventually we got to see the blue fire!! Highly appreciated both their hardwork and also the team, that’s a really great experience 👍 highly recommended

We really appreciate your kind words and recommendation. Hope to see you again on your next adventure with us!

reviews.name: accounts/113259255222289357013/locations/11306571900359184784/reviews/AbFvOqlof-4YjP8s6rd3caf5vZ0poyug1Q3me4g55AJL7OaoFDs8CHOtI5PAnzL9cVdbydCkMprj_A

reviews.comment:
Overall we are very happy with the service given by the local guide!

We took the 3D2N Private Tour to Mount Ijen, Bromo and Madakaripura Waterfall.

Freddy our guide and driver was excellent in taking care of us and meeting our needs. He picked us up from the airport straight and send us to every location with ease. He is also fun to talk to, and helped us to take nice photos too. Towards the end, we felt really sad to say goodbye 🥲

Boi, our local guide over at Ijen was amazing. He briefed us on Ijen and throughout the tough difficult trail, he guided us and make sure we are ok. We felt safe with him and we are so so glad he was very patient with us. He is also funny too 😆

Overall the trip was amazing, we loved it. The only feedback we have were the accomodation

For the first accommodation, Baratha Hotel, the walls were very thin and the room was too dark. When we were trying to get some rest, the guests next room were making too much noise that we can’t get enough sleep for the Ijen hike 😣

And then when we went to the second accommodation, Joglo Kecombrang, it was not well lit and the walls were too thin. There was a nearby neighbour who was playing loud music and because we were very tired from Ijen, we can’t sleep for Bromo. Worst of all, the water heater was not working so I didn’t shower for that night, making me very cranky and agitated because of the lack of sleep and no water heater.

Other than that, the trip, the guides and experience was amazing. Definitely recommended (but with a change in accommodation)

Would have been 5 Stars if accommodation was good

reviewReply.comment:
Dear Rai Y,

Thank you so much for your detailed and thoughtful review 🙏
We’re truly happy to hear that you enjoyed the overall experience, and that our guides Freddy and Boi made your journey memorable and fun! Your kind words will surely make their day 😊

We also sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced with the accommodations. We fully understand how important a good rest is—especially before and after demanding hikes like Ijen and Bromo.

Your feedback has been well noted. We're currently reviewing our accommodation partners and working on improvements to ensure better sleep quality, quieter environments, and functioning facilities like water heaters.

Thank you again for your honesty and for still recommending us. Your review motivates us to improve further and give the best experience for all our future guests.

Warm regards,
Java Volcano Tour Operator Team 🌋

reviews.name: accounts/113259255222289357013/locations/11306571900359184784/reviews/AbFvOqno1zLS4UrUzNNGk8H0xrUQR3kWsQO-OeTGPMen_90AzMEMlIXx_d7cc9di5zVHXyAlc8WJ

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) The Madakaripura-Bromo-Ijen tour was excellent. It's very well organized, and you're accompanied from the moment they pick you up at the airport until they drop you off at your next destination three days later. Our guide, Gufron, was excellent—very respectful, friendly, and always willing to help you get the best photo. Our driver, Mr. Joyo, is a great driver; always with a smile on his face, he'll make sure you arrive at your destination first. It's said that he used to be a Formula 1 driver. In short, if you visit Indonesia, I highly recommend contacting them.

(Original)
El tour de Madakaripura-Bromo-Ijen fue excelente. Está muy bien organizado y estás acompañado desde que te recogen en el aeropuerto hasta que 3 días más tarde te dejan en tu siguiente destino. Nuestro guía Gufron fue excelente, muy respetuoso, simpático y siempre dispuesto a que consigas tu mejor fotografía. El chófer Mr Joyo es un gran conductor, siempre con una sonrisa en la cara hará que llegues el primero a tu destino, se comenta que anteriormente fue piloto de fórmula 1. En definitiva, si visitas Indonesia te recomiendo que les contactes.

reviews.comment:
I joined the 3-day, 2-night Bromo and Ijen volcano tour, and it was absolutely worth it! The scenery along the way was like a painting—I’d definitely do it all over again! 👍🏻 Highly recommend our guide Guforn—he was friendly and really took good care of everyone. He kept helping my friend who was on a mission to buy fruit the whole time—poor guy probably had his hands full with us! 🤣

The most unforgettable part was hiking in the dark early in the morning to see the blue fire. It was tiring, but the moment we saw that glowing blue flame, it felt like everything was totally worth it. I also met so many fun and interesting new friends. The whole trip was incredibly fulfilling and full of joy!

We’re grateful to have been part of your travel memories and we hope to welcome you again on another adventure in the future. Wishing you many more amazing journeys ahead!

Warm regards,
Java Volcano Tour Operator Team 🌋✨

I am glad I chose Java volcano tour operator. Your service is spectacular. Right from communication to providing on time service, it has been amazing over all. Now to specify the members of your team… Freddie was the first one to meet in Surabaya hotel, he is a very punctual sweet and friendly person who is always on time no matter what time of the day. Exceptional driving skills.
Next we met Rendi for the ijen trek… again a very polite, punctual and well informed person. Kept us accompanied and encouraged us through out the trek. We had the time of our life these 2 days capturing memories for a lifetime. Every other person we encountered from your team for the jeep, cab and boat were all well coordinated and made us feel safe. Thank you once again for making it the best trip ever. I will highly recommend

Dear Disna,
Thank you for taking the time to leave a review.

We would like to respectfully clarify that Java Volcano Tour Operator (JVTO) is a specialized inbound tour operator, serving mainly international travelers who book multi-day adventure packages through our official website and verified platforms.

Given this, there is a very low likelihood that you have used our services as described. Nonetheless, if you believe this review is based on a genuine experience, we would sincerely appreciate if you could provide more details (e.g., booking reference, travel dates), so we can investigate and address it properly.

We are committed to maintaining excellent service and transparency, and we thank all our customers for helping us grow with honest and constructive feedback.

Warm regards,
The JVTO Team

reviews.comment:
We had a fantastic trip to Bromo and Tumpak Sewu with JVTO and Gufron as our tour guide. We were picked up on time from the airport and was ferried to all the location in comfort. The whole tour is also accommodating and flexible - when we need to stop for break/quick snack purchase - it was always being accommodated

The operator responses for every questions and queries was also very fast and fantastic. when there was an issue (eg: the Ijen closure), the operators assisted in offering alternatives.

Definitely highly recommended!

We truly appreciate your recommendation and hope to welcome you on another adventure soon!

reviews.comment:
We had a great experience! The tour agency was prompt in replying our queries. Our tour guide/driver, Yusuf, was also friendly and helpful.

As there was some volcanic activity on Ijen, the tour agency was prompt in updating us and suggesting an alternative itinerary for the affected portion, which ended being great as well!

Mt bromo was spectacular!

reviews.comment:
We had an incredible journey with JVTO during our recent trip to Tempak Sewu Waterfall and Mount Bromo! From the moment we embarked, everything was meticulously planned and executed flawlessly. Our tour guide, Rendi, and driver, Gean, were exceptional. They were not only proficient in English but also engaged us in enriching conversations throughout the trip.
Initially, our itinerary included a visit to Mount Ijen. However, due to increased volcanic activity, JVTO swiftly offered us alternative destinations. We opted to explore Tempak Sewu Waterfall, and it turned out to be a breathtaking experience that exceeded our expectations.

Overall, our experience with JVTO was outstanding, and we wholeheartedly recommend their services to fellow travelers. We're already looking forward to booking another tour with JVTO in the future, particularly to visit Mount Ijen once conditions allow.

reviewReply.comment:

Rendi and Gean will be thrilled to know their efforts made your trip so enjoyable. We appreciate your understanding regarding the itinerary adjustment, and we're glad that the alternative destinations exceeded your expectations. We can’t wait to welcome you back when conditions allow for another visit to Mount Ijen. Until then, safe travels, and we look forward to your next adventure with us!

reviews.name: accounts/113259255222289357013/locations/11306571900359184784/reviews/AbFvOqm_0roik_Uq-zB9KHNLxOYMAPy_gfuuB1xOWgrFLZS7zhueesoBtq2acSRtFWeuA1ji96GqnA

reviews.comment:
Trip of a Lifetime: East Java Adventure

Our recent journey through East Java with JVTO was nothing short of extraordinary. We took the 5D4N package and over the course of several days, we explored some of the region's most iconic destinations, including Tumpak Sewu Waterfall, Mount Bromo, and Mount Ijen.

Overall Experience:
Everything is prepared and well-planned for the entire trip. All detailed information is written on the website and you will easily have a worry - free journey.
Their passion for East Java was infectious, and their attention to detail ensured that every aspect of our trip was smooth and enjoyable. From arranging comfortable accommodations to recommending local delicacies, JVTO went above and beyond to make this trip unforgettable.

Conclusion:
We cannot recommend JVTO highly enough for anyone planning to explore East Java. Their expertise, professionalism, and genuine enthusiasm for sharing the wonders of their homeland made our journey an absolute delight.

Thank you, Freddy and Juan , for an incredible adventure that exceeded all expectations.
We look forward to our next exploration with you!

Final Thoughts:
If you're looking for a memorable tour experience that goes beyond the typical sights, JVTO is the perfect choice.
Thank you, JVTO for an unforgettable day!

reviewReply.comment:
Hi Chrystal,

Thank you so much for your heartfelt review! We’re thrilled to hear that your 5D4N East Java adventure was such a memorable experience. It’s wonderful to know that our team's passion for East Java and attention to detail made your journey smooth and enjoyable. Freddy and Juan will be so pleased to hear your kind words. We’re honored to have been a part of your adventure and can’t wait to welcome you back for your next exploration with us!

Best regards

reviews.comment: The guide and driver were really nice, we did the 3D2N tour. We were also worried about the working conditions of our guide.. aside from that the sites were really nice and worth the experience it was just really rushed and exhausting. We appreciate greatly our guide he was very funny , nice and knew a lot about the places (:

reviews.name: accounts/113259255222289357013/locations/11306571900359184784/reviews/AbFvOqk3-GXBmD6W0Ntf-NlRgSJd_zkuHu4U7ZVz1PEsWsxcwzrKqdR7SSkPoe6P-mYt9MbB9hRb_A

reviews.comment:
Last week my friend and I had the pleasure of visiting Ijen Crater, Tumpak Sewu Waterfall and Mt. Bromo. It was definitely a memorable trip.
A significant part of what made this trip enjoyable was our driver cum guide, Johan. Firstly he was always on time and he also made sure we had ample time for travelling between different destinations. Most importantly, there was always more than enough time for photography. His friendly demeanor and expert guidance helped us navigate the crowds and get the best spots for pictures.
Alfi Layalin was the guide attached to us throughout our hike at Ijen Crater. She patiently hiked with us up and down the mountain and gently guided us along the rocky paths. She also took beautiful pictures for us.
Gawan Sulis was our guide at the waterfall. He never hesitated to lend his arm for us to hold on to as we climb up and down the slippery route.
For anyone looking to explore these parts of Indonesia, we highly recommend Java Volcano Tour Operator. The stunning views on top of the expert guidances made this trip truly unforgettable. 👍👍👍

reviewReply.comment:
Thank you for sharing your wonderful experience! It sounds like you had an incredible trip to Ijen Crater, Tumpak Sewu Waterfall, and Mt. Bromo. We're thrilled to hear that Johan, Alfi Layalin, and Sulis made your journey memorable with their expertise and friendliness.

Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we hope to welcome you back for more adventures in the future.

Thank you once again for your kind words and feedback! 👍👍👍

reviews.comment:
We had a great experience with Java Volcano. We were a group of 12 and visited Ijen, Tumpak Sewu Waterfall and Bromo. From the very beginning, Java Volcano organized everything (pick up from airport, stop when we needed, stuffs for the hike,etc.).
Every hotel were comfortable and clean, it is a excellent value for money, and one less mental burden for many a trip! Special thanks to our guide and photographer Yoga for his constant attention. And last but not least, thanks to our driver Johan, for his efficient driving, ensuring that we arrived before everyone else at the foot of the mountains!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for sharing your experience with Java Volcano! 😊 We're delighted to hear that you had a great trip exploring Ijen, Tumpak Sewu Waterfall, and Bromo with us. We strive to provide excellent value for money and ensure that every aspect of your journey is well-organized and enjoyable. We'll pass on your appreciation to Yoga for his attentive guidance and to Johan for his efficient driving. We look forward to welcoming you back on another adventure soon! 🌋🏞️🚗

reviews.comment: Views of Ijen and Bromo are spectacular. Tour guide Taufik is humorous and very patient. He is so experienced and gives very good estimations of timings such that we caught all the pretty sceneries at the exact right timings. He also helps us along the way on the more difficult treks. Best tour guide! Driver Johan drives smoothly and fast. Your operator also replies very promptly. Good tour! Will recommend!! :)

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for sharing your wonderful experience! 😊 We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the spectacular views of Ijen and Bromo with us. For an unforgettable adventure through East Java's stunning landscapes, I highly recommend them."

reviews.name: accounts/113259255222289357013/locations/11306571900359184784/reviews/AbFvOqnL4_XnlMLJeR0Mh-484Qyb8bg6A93lAoMbibBPlCA1xi7OQXtGSJ6sqoy40fOJJgWMi991Zg

reviews.comment:
Had an excellent 4D3N ijen-sewu-bromo trip with tour guide Anjas. He spoke decent English and we could understand each others’ jokes, he was also creative at taking fun photos, all these created a lot of fun for the journey.

The trip was indeed tiring as there were lots of night activities but he took great care of us and recommended genuinely decent restaurants (not those kind of fake recommendation and taking commission) along the way. We managed to have a whole roast duck after 2 days of ayam goreng haha.

Anjas was the highlight for the trip and it was certainly worth meeting this handsome young man

reviewReply.comment:
Thank you for sharing your wonderful experience with tour guide Anjas! It sounds like you had an incredible adventure exploring Ijen, Sewu, and Bromo with him. It's fantastic to hear that Anjas not only provided excellent service but also added a lot of fun and creativity to your journey. His ability to communicate well in English, understand jokes, and take memorable photos surely enhanced your overall experience. It's great that he ensured your comfort throughout the trip and recommended genuinely good restaurants along the way. Your mention of enjoying a whole roast duck after days of ayam goreng made me smile—it's those little moments that truly make a trip memorable. Anjas sounds like a gem of a guide, and I'm glad you had the opportunity to meet him. Thank you for sharing your positive experience!

-SAM

reviews.name: accounts/113259255222289357013/locations/11306571900359184784/reviews/AbFvOqkHp_CuEJri4bNKAbsOnC6IJw_Hp1bvBOtRDXYHGHmcTbRPPQBukjGrwxgzhuVhXi0j9uvX

reviews.comment:
Everything was very good for this tour and we had wonderful sunrises. Our driver/tour guide Fredi was attentive but spoke very little English and drove a little too fast. Anjas was a fantastic guide for the Ijen hike and spoke great english. The jeep tour for Mt Bromi was great.
We gave it a 4 because the Grand Whiz hotel  room needs renovation and our bathroom leaked water all night. We would suggest checking the room first because many people complain on the reviews.

We booked on Klook. Would recommend this tour operater.

reviewReply.comment:
Hi Zohar,

Thank you for sharing your experience and for your kind words about Fredi and Anjas! We're glad you enjoyed the sunrise and tours. 😊

We appreciate your feedback about the Grand Whiz Hotel and will address this with our hotel partners.

Thank you for recommending us, and we hope to welcome you again! 🌋

only thing i would say is that more details on expectations of each activity would help such as crowds/food
